problem id: 7eaa679e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7)

examples:
  01101110 -> 00110111
  00101001 -> 10010100
  10011011 -> 11001101
  00110101 -> 10011010
  00001011 -> 10000101
  01101101 -> 10110110
  00000101 -> 10000010
  10110011 -> 11011001

query: 01101011
predicted answer: 10110101
